source_authority: National Statistical Office (NSO), Ministry of Statistics and Programme Implementation (MoSPI), Government of India
unit: percent YoY real GDP growth (annual FY26 estimate)
unit_secondary: percent YoY real GDP growth (Q3 FY26, latest quarterly)
as_of: FY2025-26 Second Advance Estimate (Q3 FY26 latest quarterly: Oct-Dec 2025)
data_notes: IMPORTANT: MoSPI released a new GDP series with base year 2022-23 on February 27, 2026, replacing the old 2011-12 series. All figures in this file use the new 2022-23 base year unless explicitly noted. Q4 FY25 and Q1 FY26 were originally published under old base year 2011-12; Q4 FY25 has not yet been revised under new series (shown with is_provisional:true). Q4 FY26 (Jan-Mar 2026) data is not yet available as of April 2026 (expected May/Jun 2026). Annual FY26 estimate is Second Advance — subject to further revision when provisional and then final estimates are released. All GDP estimates flagged is_provisional:true per plan rule (GDP revised significantly after first release).

series.source: MoSPI NSO Provisional Estimates, released May 30, 2025 — mospi.gov.in/sites/default/files/press_release/NAD_PR_30may2025.pdf; PIB prid=2132688. NOTE: Not yet revised under new 2022-23 base year series as of April 2026.

series.base_year_used: 2011-12 (original release); may have been revised under 2022-23 base
series.source: MoSPI NSO Quarterly Estimates, released ~August 29, 2025 — PIB prid=2161834. 'Real GDP has been estimated to grow by 7.8% in Q1 of FY 2025-26 over the growth rate of 6.5% during Q1 of FY 2024-25.' Nominal GDP grew 8.8% in Q1 FY26.

MoSPI NSO: First release Nov 28, 2025 under 2011-12 base (prid=2195851): 8.2%. Revised to 8.4% under new 2022-23 base series (Feb 27, 2026 new series press note, mospi.gov.in). Real GDP ₹48.63 lakh crore vs ₹44.94 lakh crore in Q2 FY24-25. Secondary sector 8.1%, Tertiary 9.2%.

MoSPI NSO new series (base year 2022-23), released February 27, 2026 — PIB prid=2233518; mospi.gov.in. Real GDP ₹84.54 lakh crore vs ₹78.41 lakh crore in Q3 FY24-25. Nominal GDP ₹90.91 lakh crore, growth 8.9%. Manufacturing sector double-digit growth. Growth accelerated from 7.4% in Q3 FY23-24 and 7.4% in Q3 FY24-25.
Not yet released. Expected: MoSPI Provisional Estimates, approximately May/June 2026. ACTION: populate when released.

fy26_second_advance.note: Second Advance Estimate under new base year 2022-23. Previous First Advance Estimate (Jan 7, 2026) under old 2011-12 base was 7.4%.

fy26_first_advance.note: Superseded by second advance estimate under new base year.

fy25_annual.note: Revised to 7.1% under new base year 2022-23, from 6.5% under old 2011-12 base.

base_year_change_note: On February 27, 2026, MoSPI released a new national accounts series with base year 2022-23 (replacing 2011-12). Key implications: (1) Method changed from single-deflation to double-deflation for real GVA. (2) FY26 annual growth revised UP from 7.4% to 7.6%. (3) FY24-25 revised UP from 6.5% to 7.1%. (4) FY23-24 revised DOWN from 9.2% to 7.2% — significant downward revision. (5) Nominal GDP size revised DOWN ~3.3% (₹345.47 lakh crore vs earlier estimate). Cross-period comparisons must use same base year series.
notes: India's GDP accelerated through FY2025-26: Q1=7.8%, Q2=8.4% (highest since Q3 FY22-23), Q3=7.8%. Full year FY26 second advance estimate: 7.6% (new base 2022-23), up from 7.1% in FY25. Strong manufacturing and services growth; private consumption growing. Q4 FY26 data expected May/Jun 2026. All quarterly figures flagged provisional — GDP estimates get revised up to 3 years after initial release.
